parameters.query: SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url FROM public.global_settings WHERE key IN ('n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode: const request=$('Email Template Editor App Webhook').first()?.json??$input.first()?.json??{}; const query=request.query??request; const clean=(value)=>value===null||value===undefined?'':String(value).trim(); const parseId=(value)=>{const n=Number.parseInt(clean(value),10); return Number.isInteger(n)&&n>0?n:null;}; const parseTypeFilter=(value)=>{const raw=clean(value).toLowerCase(); if(raw==='email'||raw==='0') return '0'; if(raw==='header'||raw==='1') return '1'; if(raw==='signature'||raw==='2') return '2'; return '';}; return [{json:{template_id:parseId(query.template_id),type_filter:parseTypeFilter(query.type_filter),active_filter:(()=>{const raw=clean(query.active_filter).toLowerCase(); return ['active','inactive'].includes(raw)?raw:'';})(),mode:clean(query.mode).toLowerCase()==='new'?'new':'view',flash_message:clean(query.message),flash_error:clean(query.error),n8n_base_url:''}}];

const input=$input.first().json??{}; const sqlLiteral=(value)=>"'"+String(value??'').replace(/'/g,"''")+"'"; const typeFilter=input.type_filter!==''?` AND t.template_type = ${Number.parseInt(input.type_filter,10)}`:''; const activeFilter=input.active_filter==='active'?' AND t.is_active = TRUE':(input.active_filter==='inactive'?' AND t.is_active = FALSE':''); const selectedIdSql=Number.isInteger(input.template_id)?String(input.template_id):'NULL'; const useFirst=input.mode==='new'?'FALSE':'TRUE'; const sql=`WITH summary AS (SELECT count(*)::int AS total_templates, count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active)::int AS active_templates, count(*) FILTER (WHERE template_type = 0)::int AS email_templates, count(*) FILTER (WHERE template_type = 2)::int AS signature_templates FROM public.email_templates), template_rows AS (SELECT id, template_key, template_name, template_type, subject_template, text_template, html_template, is_active, updated_at FROM public.email_templates t WHERE TRUE${typeFilter}${activeFilter} ORDER BY template_type ASC, lower(template_name) ASC, template_key ASC), selected_template AS (SELECT * FROM public.email_templates WHERE id = COALESCE(${selectedIdSql}, CASE WHEN ${useFirst} THEN (SELECT id FROM template_rows LIMIT 1) ELSE NULL END)) SELECT (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(template_rows)) FROM template_rows), '[]'::json) AS template_rows, COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_template) FROM selected_template), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_template`; return [{json:{...input,sql}}];
